home.hero_slogan_sanskrit: न हि ज्ञानेन सदृशं पवित्रमिह विद्यते।
home.hero_slogan_english: Our goal is to nurture students into cultured, value-driven, and exemplary personalities.
home.about_description: Welcome to Manpadle Highschool - a Residential and Non-Residential School founded in 1994 and recognized by the Government of Maharashtra in 2000. A place where every child is known, cared for, and encouraged to do their best. Manpadale Highschool was started to give good education to children in our village and nearby areas. Our school runs from Class 5 to 10 and is managed by Late Buvasaheb Patil Shikshan Prasarak Mandal, Manpadale and awarded with the Dalit Mitra Puraskar. We believe every child deserves a chance to study. That is why we provide free admission, free uniform, and free books to all students. Our teachers work hard every day to help each child grow and succeed.

about_page.title: About
about_page.subtitle: Building excellence through quality education and holistic development for over
about_page.story_p1: Founded in Year 1994, Recognized by Government of Maharashtra in year 2000, Manpadale High School is a Government Aided Residential and Non-Residential School, located in the village of Manpadale, Taluka Hatkanangale, District Kolhapur, has been a trusted center of learning for rural students for many years. Our school is run by Late Buvasaheb Patil Shikshan Prasarak Mandal, an organization honored with the Dalit Mitra Puraskar for its contribution to education and social development. We offer education from Class 5 to Class 10, with a strong focus on building not just academic knowledge, but also discipline, values, and confidence in every student.
about_page.story_p2: We understand the challenges faced by rural families. That is why we ensure that no child is denied education due to financial limitations. Our goal is to create a supportive environment where every student feels encouraged to learn and grow.
about_page.vision_text: To create a supportive and inspiring environment where every student gains knowledge, confidence, and values to shape a better future and contribute meaningfully to society.
about_page.mission_text: To provide quality education to every child while supporting their overall growth and ensuring that no student is held back due to financial or social challenges.
about_page.facilities_subtitle: Advanced infrastructure designed to inspire curiosity and facilitate holistic development.
about_page.facility1_desc: Free admission, uniforms, and textbooks for all students.
about_page.facility2_desc: Digital learning support integrated into every classroom.
about_page.facility3_desc: Regular tests and personal attention to every student.
about_page.facility4_desc: Dedicated prep for NMMS and other scholarship exams.
about_page.facility5_desc: CCTV surveillance ensuring a secure campus environment.
about_page.facility6_desc: Regular sports activities and physical training sessions.
about_page.facility7_desc: Festivals, educational tours, and personality development sessions.
about_page.facility8_desc: Social awareness programs and community outreach events.
about_page.hostel_subtitle: A structured, safe, and nurturing residential environment for every boarder.
about_page.hostel_f1: Separate hostel for boys and girls
about_page.hostel_f2: Clean and spacious rooms with proper ventilation
about_page.hostel_food4: Weekly menu chart displayed for students
about_page.hostel_routine_note: * Above timetable applies Monday to Friday. Holiday schedule may vary accordingly.
about_page.principal_p1: Education is the strongest tool to change our future, and every child deserves that opportunity. At Manpadale High School, we believe that no dream should stop because of financial difficulties or lack of resources. That is why we provide free admission, books, and uniforms — so every child can learn with dignity and confidence.
about_page.principal_p2: To all students, remember that your background does not decide your future — your efforts do. No matter the challenges, keep learning, keep growing, and never lose hope. Our school is always here to guide and support you in every step of your journey.

donate_page.faq_click_hint: Click any question to see the answer
donate_page.hero_subtitle: Your contribution helps us provide quality education and create opportunities for deserving students
donate_page.why_p1: At Manpadale High School, we believe that quality education should be accessible to all students, regardless of their financial background. Your generous donations help us bridge the gap and create equal opportunities for every child to excel.
donate_page.why_p2: Over the years, contributions from alumni, parents, and well-wishers have enabled us to provide scholarships to deserving students, upgrade our facilities, and introduce innovative learning programs. Every donation, big or small, makes a tangible difference in a student's life.
donate_page.why_p3: We maintain complete transparency in how donations are utilized. Annual reports detailing fund allocation and impact are shared with all donors, ensuring your trust in our commitment to educational excellence.
donate_page.ways_subtitle: Choose how you'd like to make a difference
donate_page.contrib1_desc: Support students with books, stationery, and educational resources
donate_page.contrib1_impact: Help 50+ students access quality learning materials
donate_page.contrib2_desc: Contribute to upgrading technology and digital infrastructure
donate_page.contrib3_desc: Share your expertise and time with our students
donate_page.contrib3_impact: Guide and inspire the next generation
donate_page.contrib4_desc: General donations for scholarships and school development
donate_page.contrib4_impact: Make quality education accessible to all
donate_page.how_subtitle: Multiple convenient options to support our cause
donate_page.method1_desc: Quick and easy payment through any UPI app
donate_page.method2_desc: Direct bank transfer for larger contributions
donate_page.method3_desc: Donate in person at our administrative office

donate_page.form_error_msg: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.
donate_page.faq1_q: Will my donation reach the students directly?
donate_page.faq1_a: 100% of your donation is used for students — from buying textbooks and uniforms to improving classrooms. No middlemen involved.
donate_page.faq2_q: Can I donate a small amount? Is there a minimum?
donate_page.faq2_a: Every rupee counts. There is no minimum donation — even ₹50 or ₹100 makes a real difference for a child's education.
donate_page.faq3_q: Can local businesses or shops donate?
donate_page.faq3_a: Yes! Local businesses can sponsor specific needs like a classroom, library books, or sports equipment and get recognized as a school supporter publicly.
donate_page.faq4_q: Is my donation safe? How do I trust the school?
donate_page.faq4_a: We are a government-registered institution. All donations are recorded in our official accounts, audited yearly, and open for community review.
